title: BlastProtLeggings
description: This resource pack changes the texture of Diamond and Netherite leggings to red when enchanted with Blast Protection, providing a clear visual indicator of their enchantment.
body:
# 🔥 BlastProtLeggings Texture Pack
## Overview:
The BlastProtLeggings texture pack enhances your Minecraft experience by visually distinguishing Diamond and Netherite leggings enchanted with Blast Protection. When these leggings are enchanted, their texture changes to a vibrant red, providing an immediate visual cue of their enchantment status.

## Why It's Useful in PvP:
In PvP, quickly identifying your gear's enchantments can be crucial for survival and strategy. This texture pack allows you to:

- ****Instant Recognition:**** Easily spot your Blast Protection-enchanted leggings at a glance.

- ****Enhanced Awareness:**** Stay prepared for explosive encounters by knowing your gear's status.

- ****Improved Strategy:**** Make informed decisions during combat based on your equipment's enchantment.

## Requirements:

- ****[Optifine](https://optifine.net/home):**** Essential for enabling Custom Item Textures (CIT).

- ****[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn):**** Allows for the dynamic texture change based on enchantment.

## Installation Instructions:

### For Optifine:

- Visit the ****[Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)**** website and download the version compatible with your Minecraft version.

- Run the downloaded file to install OptiFine.

### For Fabric:

- Go to the ****[CIT Resewn page](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)**** on Modrinth and download the version that matches your Minecraft version.

- Place the downloaded .jar file into your Minecraft mods folder.

## 📂 Locating the Resource Packs Folder
- Open your Minecraft Launcher:
Launch Minecraft and navigate to the main menu.

- Access Resource Packs:
Click on Options > Resource Packs.
- Open Resource Pack Folder:

- Click on Open Resource Pack Folder.

This action will open the ****resourcepacks**** folder where you need to place your texture pack.
